title: Iran attacks UAE; U.S. says it sank boats in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Stock market indices fell, and oil prices rose after the reported attack on the United Arab Emirates by Iran, which came nearly a month into a ceasefire.
summary_public: Stock market indices fell, and oil prices rose after the reported attack on the United Arab Emirates by Iran, which came nearly a month into a ceasefire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran attacks UAE; U.S. says it sank boats in Strait of Hormuz
